objective: Fix npm install/build verification blockers after Codex provider implementation and validate the repo from the correct directories.

edits.change: Removed unused/incompatible @lobehub/fluent-emoji, @lobehub/icons, and @lobehub/ui dependencies to eliminate the hard npm peer conflict with antd 5.
Regenerated lockfile after dependency cleanup via npm install.
Changed updateTimeout typing to ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> for browser/Node compatibility.
Replaced the lone @lobehub/icons usage with lucide-react icons already present in the repo.

commands.result: failed due missing libclang for bindgen after dependency compilation

verification.frontend_install: npm install completed successfully after dependency cleanup; remaining warnings are peer-range warnings from @docsearch/react and @vitejs/plugin-vue.
verification.rust: cargo check in src-tauri failed because bindgen could not find clang.dll/libclang.dll and requested LIBCLANG_PATH.

outcome: Frontend verification blockers are fixed. Rust verification remains blocked by the local machine missing libclang, not by the timeout typing or npm dependency issue.
open_questions: Whether the repo wants to keep lucide placeholders for Gemini/Claude or later replace them with local brand icon components.
Whether the Windows Rust environment should standardize LLVM/libclang installation for bindgen-based crates.
